zh.lifeSummary: 當Rohese de Verdun於大約1204年出生在英國斯塔福爾阿頓時，她的父親Nicholas de Verdun32歲，母親Clementia le Boteler31歲。她於大約1225年9月4日與Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1247年2月10日在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾頓享年44歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾林斯同。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rohese de Verdun于大约1204年出生在英国斯塔福爾阿頓时，她的父亲Nicholas de Verdun32岁，母亲Clementia le Boteler31岁。她于大约1225年9月4日与Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1247年2月10日在英国萊希斯特斯爾貝爾頓享年44岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾林斯同。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Rohese de Verdun was born about 1204, in Alton, Staffordshire, England, her father, Nicholas de Verdun, was 32 and her mother, Clementia le Boteler, was 31. She married Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland about 4 September 1225, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 10 February 1247, in Belton, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Thringstone, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rohese de Verdun est née environ 1204, à Alton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas de Verdun, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Clementia le Boteler, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland environ 4 septembre 1225, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 février 1247, à Belton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Thringstone, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rohese de Verdun um 1204 in Alton, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas de Verdun 32 und ihre Mutter Clementia le Boteler 31. Sie hat um 4. September 1225 in Staffordshire, England Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Februar 1247 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Belton, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Thringstone, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese de Verdun è nata il circa 1204 nel Alton, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Nicholas de Verdun, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Clementia le Boteler, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland circa 4 settembre 1225, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 febbraio 1247, nel Belton, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Thringstone, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Rohese de Verdunが約1204年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアルトンで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Verdunは32歳，母Clementia le Botelerは31歳であった。約1225年9月4日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでTheobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Irelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1247年2月10日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルトンで44歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアスリングストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rohese de Verdun(이)가 대략 1204년 영국 스태퍼드실르 알턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas de Verdun(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clementia le Boteler(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1225년 9월 4일 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1247년 2월 10일 영국 레이스스터실르 벨턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 스링스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese de Verdun nasceu aproximadamente 1204, em Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas de Verdun, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Clementia le Boteler, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland aproximadamente 4 de setembro de 1225, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1247, em Belton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Thringstone, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rohese de Verdun родилась около 1204 г. в местности алтон, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas de Verdun было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Clementia le Boteler, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland около 4 сентября 1225 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 10 февраля 1247 г. в местности белтон, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности трингстоун, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rohese de Verdun nació aproximadamente 1204, en Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas de Verdun, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Clementia le Boteler, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland aproximadamente 4 de septiembre de 1225, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1247, en Belton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Thringstone, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
